name: <Display name> mod learner demo
objective: Learn a trusted local mod that <specific behavior>.
modApiHints: Use export function activate(letta) or a default export.
Use only the trusted local mod API exposed through the letta argument; do not import from repo source files.

scenarios.name: happy-path
scenarios.prompt: <Prompt that triggers the mod and requires the sentinel in the final answer>. The memory directory is available in MEMORY_DIR.

scenarios.name: negative-control
scenarios.prompt: <Prompt where the mod behavior should not trigger>.
forbiddenTraceMarkers: <tool or event marker that should not appear>
